title: Katana Acquires IDEX to Launch Katana Perps, Bringing Native Perpetual Futures to Its DeFi Chain
author: Not Specified
description: Katana has completed its acquisition of IDEX and launched Katana Perps, a native perpetual futures platform integrated into the Katana chain. The move allows Katana to own core trading infrastructure rather than relying on third-party applications. Matthew Fisher has been appointed CEO, and the platform targets professional traders and institutions with CEX-grade performance features.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: IDEX was successfully acquired and rebranded as Katana Perps, gaining integration into a major DeFi chain and access to a broader user base. The team's nearly decade-long experience in on-chain trading infrastructure is now leveraged at scale.

title: Industrial Tech Crossovers: When Manufacturing Meets Innovation
author: Nathan Reiff
description: The article explores how technology is transforming manufacturing, highlighting companies that are innovating at the intersection of industrial and tech sectors, focusing on cost reduction, efficiency, and strategic growth.

title: Industrial pump maker IDEX Corp to buy Mott Corp for $1 billion By Reuters - Investing.com
author: Reuters
description: IDEX Corp, an industrial pump maker, announced it will acquire Mott Corp, a filtration products maker, for $1 billion in cash. The deal is expected to close by the end of the third quarter of 2024.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is expanding its business through a $1 billion acquisition, indicating growth and confidence in its operations.
